prompt: Audit untagged resources in project ml-research and report what's missing the 'cost-centre' tag.
reference_response: Audit of project ml-research: 47 resources are missing the cost-centre tag. The top three offenders by cost are an A2-highgpu cluster ($4,200/mo), a 12TB Cloud SQL HA replica ($3,800/mo), and a 5-node Dataflow job ($1,900/mo). Owner outreach: ml-research-leads@example.com. Action: apply cost-centre tag within 7 days; escalation to finops-governance if unresolved.
